mapper.select: select id, tenant_id as tenantId, scm_hospital_code as scmHospitalCode, remark, del_flag as delFlag, create_by as createBy, create_time as createTime, update_by as updateBy, update_time as updateTime from spd_scm_tenant_bind where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and (del_flag is null or del_flag = '' or del_flag = '0') limit 1

select scm_hospital_code from spd_scm_tenant_bind where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and (del_flag is null or del_flag = '' or del_flag = '0') and scm_hospital_code is not null and trim(scm_hospital_code) != '' limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into spd_scm_tenant_bind(id, tenant_id, scm_hospital_code, remark, del_flag, create_by, create_time) values(#{id}, #{tenantId}, #{scmHospitalCode}, #{remark}, '0', #{createBy}, now())
mapper.update: update spd_scm_tenant_bind set scm_hospital_code = #{scmHospitalCode}, remark = #{remark}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = now() where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and (del_flag is null or del_flag = '' or del_flag = '0')
